TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Siliq qani ga qbhniq na Tayal uyi. maki calay yaw ga talam ta ssiliq qani. Ana ga cquliq s'ciq hiya ga nyan naha galan utux qbhniq qani. Siliq qani ga qbhniq na Tayal, sisin san naha kayal qa tyuku hiya, yaw siliq ga lmam ktayux yaw, talam silq san ta, skahul ta ryaniq 'san nya ki pinnhwaw nya cpung yaw nqu musa qmalup qani musa baqun qa gaga psaniq uyi, ita Tayal hiya ga s'agal ta tmalam yaw qa qbhniq qa siliq qani. 參考資料
S.PHON: s~ɕiliq qani ɣa qβħniq na tajal uji. maki ʦ~ʨalaj jaw ɣa talam ta s~ɕs~ɕiliq qani. ana ɣa ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕʔʦ~ʨiq ħija ɣa njan naħa ɣalan utux qβħniq qani. s~ɕiliq qani ɣa qβħniq na tajal, s~ɕis~ɕin s~ɕan naħa kajal qa tjuku ħija, jaw s~ɕiliq ɣa lmam ktajux jaw, talam s~ɕilq s~ɕan ta, s~ɕkaħul ta rjaniq ʔs~ɕan nja ki pinnħwaw nja ʦ~ʨpuŋ jaw nqu mus~ɕa qmalup qani mus~ɕa βaqun qa ɣaɣa ps~ɕaniq uji, ita tajal ħija ɣa s~ɕʔaɣal ta tmalam jaw qa qβħniq qa s~ɕiliq qani. ****
S.FORM: Siliq qani ga qbhniq na Tayal uyi. maki calay yaw ga talam ta ssiliq qani. Ana ga cquliq s'ciq hiya ga nyan naha galan utux qbhniq qani. Siliq qani ga qbhniq na Tayal, sisin san naha kayal qa tyuku hiya, yaw siliq ga lmam ktayux yaw, talam silq san ta, skahul ta ryaniq 'san nya ki pinnhwaw nya cpung yaw nqu musa qmalup qani musa baqun qa gaga psaniq uyi, ita Tayal hiya ga s'agal ta tmalam yaw qa qbhniq qa siliq qani. 參考資料
S.PHON: s~ɕiliq qani ɣa qβħniq na tajal uji. maki ʦ~ʨalaj jaw ɣa talam ta s~ɕs~ɕiliq qani. ana ɣa ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕʔʦ~ʨiq ħija ɣa njan naħa ɣalan utux qβħniq qani. s~ɕiliq qani ɣa qβħniq na tajal, s~ɕis~ɕin s~ɕan naħa kajal qa tjuku ħija, jaw s~ɕiliq ɣa lmam ktajux jaw, talam s~ɕilq s~ɕan ta, s~ɕkaħul ta rjaniq ʔs~ɕan nja ki pinnħwaw nja ʦ~ʨpuŋ jaw nqu mus~ɕa qmalup qani mus~ɕa βaqun qa ɣaɣa ps~ɕaniq uji, ita tajal ħija ɣa s~ɕʔaɣal ta tmalam jaw qa qβħniq qa s~ɕiliq qani. ****
